summary.title: New Threat Model
summary.description:
make a data flow diagram (DFD) for the system. For this you need to use
OWASP Threat Dragon (OWASP Threat Dragon | OWASP Foundation)1. You can
either run it online or install a client locally. For the components in your diagram,
add threats according to STRIDE and a description. There should be at least 10
threats in total, and at least two of these should be related to the AI-based face
recognition. Add trust boundaries as you see fit.
